The example I gave him was, you know what?

When I started gming, when I started cleaning, right?

It was only a couple of days, only a couple of days a week, like maybe two or three days a week.

It was was.

And then all of a sudden, it was two or three days, more hours.

Then it was three or four days, then it was five days, two people, all day, from nine in the morning till four in the afternoon.

Yes.

And my hours were like that, because, you know, Mom?

My kids had to go to school.

My kids had to be picked up from school at 4 o'clock in the afternoon, and I couldn't leave any early because I 11 o'clock in the morning because I needed to prepare dinner before I even left my house.
